---
title: "EM karla 2026"
subtitle: "Handbolti"
description: "Spár fyrir Evrópumeistaramótið í handbolta karla 2026"
date: last-modified
active: false
---

## Spár fyrir næstu leiki

![](figures/next_round_predictions.png){.prediction-image}

## Leikir Íslands

![](figures/iceland_games.png){.prediction-image}

## Staða riðla

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="50%"}
![](figures/group_table.png){.table-image}
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
![](figures/main_group_table.png){.table-image}
:::

:::

## Styrkur liða

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="50%"}
![](figures/styrkur.png){.strength-image}
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
![](figures/styrkur_table.png){.table-image}
:::

:::

## Heimavöllur

![](figures/home_advantage.png){.chart-image}

---

[← Mót](../index.qmd) | [Um spálíkönin](../../../um-spalikon/index.qmd)
